messages.content:
book a markiplier wwe royal rumble debut
have him enter at no. 30 and win

The stage was set for one of the biggest Royal Rumble events in WWE history. As the crowd roared in anticipation, the countdown began for the final entrant, and the number 30 flashed on the big screen.

Suddenly, the sound of "Blue Monday" by New Order blared through the arena, and the fans erupted in excitement as Markiplier stepped onto the stage, dressed in his signature red and black attire. The YouTube sensation made his way down to the ring, pausing to high-five fans and bask in the cheers of the crowd.

Markiplier climbed into the ring as the final entrant, surveying the other 29 competitors with a sly grin on his face. As the bell rang, the battle royal began, with bodies flying everywhere as the superstars fought to stay in the ring.

Markiplier masterfully maneuvered his way around the ring, delivering crushing blows to his opponents and ducking out of the way of incoming attacks. With only a handful of competitors left, Markiplier saw his opportunity.

Bounding over the top rope, he delivered a powerful kick to the back of an unsuspecting wrestler's head, sending him crashing to the ground below. With the crowd on its feet, Markiplier stood tall, the victor of the Royal Rumble.

The crowd showered Markiplier with admiration as he celebrated his win, hoisting the Royal Rumble trophy high above his head. From that moment on, Markiplier became a mainstay in the WWE, battling his way through some of the biggest and most talented wrestlers in the world, never forgetting that unforgettable debut in the Royal Rumble.

book a markiplier wwe title victory at wrestlemania
conclude with jacksepticeye help mark

It was a warm spring evening in New Orleans, and the Mercedes-Benz Superdome was packed with passionate WWE fans from all around the world. The atmosphere was electric as the Superstars of WWE battled it out in front of millions of viewers watching from around the globe. 

The main event of the evening was scheduled to be a championship match between the reigning champion, Brock Lesnar, and his challenger, Markiplier. Markiplier had worked hard to earn his spot in this match, and he had the support of his friend and fellow YouTube star, Jacksepticeye, in his corner.

As the match began, Brock Lesnar used his immense size and strength to his advantage, pinning Markiplier down and raining down a series of brutal blows. Markiplier struggled to get the upper hand, but as the match wore on, he began to dig deep and find strength from deep within.

As the match wore on, the crowd grew increasingly engaged, cheering him on as he squared off against Lesnar. It was a heated back and forth battle that went all the way to the wire, with both competitors giving everything they had.

In the end, however, it was clear who the winner would be. With the help of his friend Jacksepticeye at the ringside, Markiplier delivered a devastating finishing move and pinned Brock Lesnar for the three count, claiming victory.

The crowd erupted in cheers as Markiplier was crowned the new WWE Champion. His hard work, his passion, and his never-say-die spirit had paid off, and he had triumphed over one of the greatest wrestlers of all time.

Together, Markiplier and Jacksepticeye lifted the championship belt high above their heads, celebrating with the crowd as confetti rained down from the rafters. It was a moment they would never forget, and one that would go down in the annals of WWE history as one of the greatest championship victories of all time.

book a markiplier(w/ jacksepticeye) vs seth rollins wwe title match
conclude with mark retaining his title

The bright lights of the Staples Center in Los Angeles illuminated the ring below, as the WWE Universe waited in anticipation for what was sure to be an epic encounter. The reigning WWE Champion, Markiplier, was set to defend his title against the former champion and wrestling superstar, Seth Rollins.

As Markiplier and Jacksepticeye made their way to the ring, the crowd cheered loudly, showing their unwavering support for their champion. When Seth Rollins made his entrance, the arena erupted in boos, a sign of just how much the fans wanted to see Markiplier retain his title.

The bell rang, and the match began, with both competitors sizing each other up before launching into action. Rollins used his quickness to take the early advantage, but Markiplier was not to be deterred. He dug deep, using his strength and agility to counter Rollins' attacks and turn the tide in his favor.

As the match wore on, both wrestlers traded blow for blow, each one looking for that one decisive move that would help them claim victory. Markiplier's resilience and determination shone through, however, and he managed to evade Rollins' signature moves and wear him down.

In the end, Markiplier delivered a picture-perfect shooting star press, catching Rollins off guard and securing the win. The crowd erupted in cheers as Markiplier retained his title, and he celebrated with his friend Jacksepticeye, holding the championship belt aloft for all to see.

The victory was a testament to Markiplier's skill as a wrestler and his dedication to his craft. It also showed that he was not going to be taken down easily, no matter who his opponent was. As the WWE Universe erupted in celebration, Markiplier basked in the glory of his victory, secure in the knowledge that he had what it took to be a great champion.

book a markiplier vs riccochet wwe title match
conclude with mark retaining his title

The stage was set for an epic battle between two of the WWE's top performers. Markiplier, the reigning champion, was set to battle Ricochet, the high-flying sensation known for his aerial acrobatics and lightning-fast strikes.

As the match began, Ricochet started strong, showing off his impressive athletic ability with a series of dazzling moves. However, Markiplier was not one to be outdone. He absorbed Ricochet's onslaught, then returned fire with a series of hard-hitting shots that hit their mark.

The two superstars traded blows back-and-forth, each one taking brief periods of advantage as the crowd roared in excitement. At one point, Ricochet managed to land a beautiful 630 splash on Markiplier, but the resilient champion refused to quit.

As the match progressed, Markiplier showed off his strategic ability, using his ring awareness and psychological tactics to throw Ricochet off his game. He targeted a previously injured knee of Ricochet, which limited the high-flyer's ability to execute his trademark moves.

With the crowd firmly behind him, Markiplier delivered the coup de grace, a top-rope elbow drop that connected with Ricochet's chest with such force that fans could hear the impact throughout the arena. The referee counted the three, and Markiplier had once again retained his WWE championship.

As the crowd cheered in approval, Markiplier took his championship belt and held it high into the air. In the ring, Ricochet extended his hand in a show of good sportsmanship, which Markiplier accepted.

It was another great performance from the champion, who proved once again that he had what it took to be a true WWE legend. And as fans around the world celebrated Markiplier's latest victory, the wrestler himself could only look forward to what lay ahead, always ready for the next challenge, knowing that he had what it took to keep the title.

book a markiplier vs triple h wwe title match
conclude with mark retaining his title

The WWE Universe was buzzing with excitement for one of the biggest championship matches in recent memory. Markiplier, the reigning WWE Champion, was set to defend his title against none other than Triple H, one of the most successful and storied wrestlers in the history of the business.

As the two competitors made their entrances, the crowd was electric, with some fans chanting for Markiplier while others cheered on the veteran Triple H. The match got underway, and Triple H wasted no time taking control, using his experience and strength to wear down Markiplier.

Markiplier refused to go down easy, however. He utilized his quickness and agility, dodging Triple H's attacks and landing impressive counter-moves that got the crowd on their feet. The two men traded blows back and forth, with neither wrestler gaining the upper hand for long.

As the match wore on, Markiplier began to gain the momentum he needed to secure victory. He used his impressive stamina and endurance to keep up with Triple H, landing a series of high-flying maneuvers that caught the veteran off-guard.

In the final moments of the match, Markiplier delivered a stunning shooting star press that connected with Triple H's chest, sending him crashing to the mat. The crowd let out a thunderous roar as the referee counted to three, declaring Markiplier the victor and the still WWE Champion.

As Markiplier celebrated with his championship belt, Triple H extended his hand in a show of respect, shaking Markiplier's hand in the center of the ring. It was a hard-fought, intense match, and both wrestlers had brought their A-game.

In the end, however, it was Markiplier who emerged victorious, cementing his place as one of the greatest champions in WWE history. As the crowd chanted his name and the confetti rained down, Markiplier smiled broadly, knowing that he had truly earned this incredible moment in his career.

book a markilpier vs triple h wwe title match
conclude in a count win for triple h

As the crowd gathered in anticipation, the ring crew made final adjustments to the ring. It was set to be one of the biggest WWE championship matches in recent memory, with Markiplier defending his title against the legendary Triple H.

The two wrestlers took to the ring, with the crowd cheering and screaming in support of their favorite respective wrestler. The match began with a flurry of blows and strikes exchanged between the two competitors, with neither being able to gain the upper hand.

The match intensified as both wrestlers grew more fatigued, with Triple H beginning to dominate the bout. Lifting Markiplier in the air, Triple H successfully connected with his signature finisher, The Pedigree. As he made the cover, the referee counted to three, marking Triple H as the victor and the new WWE Champion.

The crowd was stunned at the sudden end of the match, but the legendary wrestler was triumphant in his reign. With the championship belt held high, Triple H celebrated his victory, and Markiplier could only look on in disbelief.
book a triple h stripping of the wwe title

As the WWE Universe was still stunned after the controversial ending of the Markiplier vs. Triple H match, Triple H took the mic and started to talk. He declared that he deserved to be the WWE Champion as he had been working hard for this moment. As he spoke, the audience grew more and more agitated.

Markiplier, who was still in the ring, looked on with confusion and anger. He had never seen something like this before, and was furious that he had lost his title in such a way. But before he could respond, Triple H called out the referee and demanded that the championship belt be handed over to him.

The referee hesitated for a moment, but eventually handed over the belt to Triple H, who took it with a sly grin on his face. The crowd erupted in boos, making their feelings about Triple H's actions known.

As Triple H strutted around the ring with the belt, Markiplier couldn't take it anymore. He climbed back into the ring and got in Triple H's face, demanding that the veteran wrestler hand over the belt.

Triple H simply laughed at him, mocking him with crude gestures and insults. Markiplier, now completely fed up, launched himself at Triple H, taking him down with a series of hard-hitting moves.

But just as it seemed like Markiplier was about to reclaim his championship title, Triple H called for backup. Several members of his entourage, including wrestlers like Randy Orton and Batista, entered the ring and pummeled Markiplier into submission.

As the crowd looked on in horror, Triple H stood over Markiplier, holding up the championship belt in victory. It was a shocking and controversial moment that would go down in WWE history as one of the greatest betrayals of all time.

book a markiplier and jacksepticeye vs evolution
conclude in mark winning the wwe title

In the aftermath of Triple H's controversial actions, Markiplier and his friend, Jacksepticeye, decided to take matters into their own hands. The two wrestlers issued a challenge to Triple H's faction, Evolution, hoping to avenge their wrongs and earn back the WWE title.

The challenge was accepted, and the stage was set for a huge tag team match. As the two teams made their entrances, the crowd was electric, cheering and jeering their respective favorites.

The match began with a back-and-forth exchange of blows, both teams evenly matched in strength and skill. But as the match wore on, Markiplier began to show why he was the WWE Champion, using his quickness and agility to outmaneuver his opponents and keep them at bay.

Jacksepticeye, too, proved to be a valuable asset, landing a series of high-flying moves that left the members of Evolution reeling. The crowd was firmly behind the pair, willing them to victory with every cheer and chant.

As the match approached its climax, Markiplier landed a thunderous shooting star press on Randy Orton, pinning him for the three count and securing the victory for his team. As he celebrated with Jacksepticeye and the WWE Championship belt, the crowd erupted in cheers, showing their unbridled support for their new champion.

Against all odds, Markiplier had emerged victorious once again, and Evolution had been humbled by his skill and determination. It was a triumphant moment for the WWE Champion, one that would go down in history as one of the greatest moments in wrestling lore.

book a markiplier vs the undertaker wwe title casket match
conclude with mark retaining the title

The ominous darkness of the arena was illuminated by flickering candles as the legendary Undertaker made his way to the ring. The crowd watched in awe and with some apprehension, knowing that they were about to witness a showdown for the ages.

Markiplier emerged soon after, the WWE Championship belt glinting in the dim light. The two stared each other down, and the bell sounded, signaling the start of the match.

The Undertaker dominated the early exchanges, his intimidating presence throwing Markiplier off his game. He landed his trademark moves, driving Markiplier into the mat with forceful blows. The crowd watched on in silent, for no one could ever predict what The Undertaker had in store for them next.

Markiplier fought back valiantly, however, landing a series of high-flying maneuvers that showed off his unmatched athleticism. The two exchanged brutal moves and counters, and it seemed like anyone could take control of the match at any moment.

In the final moments of the match, both men found themselves struggling to put the other down. But it was Markiplier who landed the final blow, trapping Undertaker in the casket and locking the lid shut.

The bell sounded, and Markiplier was declared the winner, having successfully defended his WWE Championship in one of the most epic casket matches ever. A thunderous cheer erupted from the crowd as Markiplier celebrated his triumph, his fans awed at his tenacity in the face of such a legendary opponent.

The Undertaker lay in the casket, defeated but not without respect for the challenger who had pushed him to his limits. In the end, it was Markiplier who retained his title, cementing his position as one of the greatest WWE Champions of all time.

book a markilplier vs logan paul wwe title ladder match
conclude with mark pushing logan paul off the ladder and retaining the title

The stage was set for a fierce ladder match between two YouTube sensations, Markiplier and Logan Paul. The WWE Universe was abuzz with excitement, eagerly anticipating the clash between two titans of the online world.

As the match began, both men fought tooth and nail to gain the upper hand, their bodies slamming against each other as they exchanged painful blows.

The ladder came into play early on, with both men eyeing it intensely, each determined to be the one to climb it and attain the coveted WWE Championship Belt.

As the match progressed, Logan Paul began to show his fierce competitive spirit, scaling the rungs of the ladder with ease, but Markiplier was not to be outdone. The two traded brutal blows on top of the ladder, each desperately trying to knock the other down.

In the end, it was Markiplier who emerged triumphant, using his skill and cunning to push Logan Paul off the ladder, sending him crashing to the mat far below.

The WWE Universe erupted in cheers as Markiplier claimed his prize, the WWE Championship Belt, holding it high above his head in victory.

The defeated but much-humbled Logan Paul lay on the canvas, forced to acknowledge the superior wrestling ability of his opponent. Markiplier had truly proved his mettle as the reigning WWE Champion, cementing his place as a true wrestling great.

As the crowd roared with approval, Markiplier celebrated his victory, basking in the adoration of his loyal fans. Another chapter had been written in his championship journey, and he was determined to make the most of every moment in the ring, always pushing himself to become even greater.
book a jacksepticeye heel turn on markilplier

The WWE Universe was in a state of shock as Jacksepticeye made his way to the ring, the sneer across his face emitting an air of sinister intent.

Markiplier stood in the center of the ring, ready for their scheduled tag team match, his trust in Jacksepticeye not wavering one bit. But that was about to change.

As the match began and the two men fought their opponents, Jacksepticeye began to grow increasingly aggressive. He would purposefully ignore Mark's tags, opting instead to carry out dirty tactics and do whatever it took to win the match, Mark's well-being be damned.

It was then that Jacksepticeye landed a devastating kick aimed towards Mark and skillfully executed it to shatter the trust earned between them. The crowd watched in disbelief as Jacksepticeye launched a fierce and unrelenting strike towards Markiplier, leaving him crumpled on the mat.

The crowd roared with boos as Jacksepticeye exited the ring, the heel turn complete. Markiplier had been betrayed by his closest friend, forever changing the landscape of their relationship and altering their lives for years
